NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 14th September, 2000 S.0.828(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 2 of the Uttar Pradesh Reorganisation Act, 2000 (29 of 2000), the Central Government hereby appoints the 1st day of November, 2000, as the appointed day for the purposes of that Act.
